dataValidation.formula1: INDIRECT("_C619_" & VLOOKUP(INDIRECT("'申請情報入力(在留資格変更許可申請)'!BW" & ROW()),_C619_C,2,FALSE) & "_L")
INDIRECT("_CB19_5_" & VLOOKUP(INDIRECT("'申請情報入力(在留資格変更許可申請)'!Z" & ROW()),_CB19_5_C,2,FALSE) & "_L")
INDIRECT("_CB19_" & VLOOKUP(INDIRECT("'申請情報入力(在留資格変更許可申請)'!S" & ROW()),_CB19_C,2,FALSE) & "_L")
INDIRECT("_CA69_1_" & VLOOKUP(INDIRECT("'申請情報入力(在留資格変更許可申請)'!K" & ROW()),_CA69_1_C,2,FALSE) & "_L")

dataValidation.sqref: BH8:BH307 AF8:AF307 AM8:AM307 AT8:AT307 BA8:BA307 BO8:BO307

dataValidation.formula1: INDIRECT("_CC13_2_" & VLOOKUP(INDIRECT("'表示シート制御マスタ'!AA4"),_CC13_2_C,2,FALSE) & "_L")

dataValidation.sqref: AI8:AI586 AP8:AP586 AW8:AW586 BD8:BD586 BK8:BK586 BR8:BR586
AJ8:AJ586 AQ8:AQ586 AX8:AX586 BE8:BE586 BL8:BL586 G8:G307 V8:V586 AC8:AC586 AE8:AE586 BS8:BS586
